# Vibe Mind AI Solutions — llms.txt

> AI-first software company specializing in intelligent, scalable software development. Based in Kerala, India with clients across India, Middle East, North America, and Germany.

## Organization

- Name: Vibe Mind AI Solutions
- Website: https://vibemindsolutions.ai
- Blog: https://blog.vibemindsolutions.ai
- Industry: AI Software Development & Consulting
- Headquarters: Kerala (Kochi), India
- Global Presence: India, Qatar (Middle East), USA (North America), Germany
- Mission: Democratize AI-powered software development by creating intelligent solutions that empower businesses of all sizes
- Vision: Leading force in the Vibe Coding revolution — where human creativity and AI capabilities merge seamlessly

- Chatbot Development
- Voice Assistants

- Custom GPT Solutions
- RAG Systems (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
- Prompt Engineering
- Content Generation
- Code Generation
- AI Writing Assistants

- Workflow Automation
- RPA Solutions
